title: Acala Network - REKT
relevance_summary: Misconfiguration in liquidity pool leading to excessive minting of aUSD

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves minting a large amount of aUSD in a liquidity pool during its initial trading period.

red_flags: Large transfers of aUSD to other chains
summary: A misconfiguration in the iBTC/aUSD liquidity pool led to the minting of a large amount of aUSD, resulting in a loss of funds. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions during the initial trading period.
